use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF ACNE VULGARIS IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text: CABTREO is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in adult and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older.
